query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_published,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%href=%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_links,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%amazon%' OR content LIKE '%awin%' OR content LIKE '%cj.com%' OR content LIKE '%shareasale%' OR content LIKE '%affiliate%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_affiliate_keywords,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%Buy Now%' OR content LIKE '%Check Price%' OR content LIKE '%View Deal%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cta_buttons
FROM articles WHERE status = 'published';

  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%amazon%' OR content LIKE '%awin%' OR content LIKE '%cj.com%' OR content LIKE '%shareasale%' OR content LIKE '%affiliate%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_affiliate_keywords,
  SUM(CASE WHEN content LIKE '%Buy Now%' OR content LIKE '%Check Price%' OR content LIKE '%View Deal%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as with_cta_buttons
FROM articles WHERE status = 'published';
